text_block_list.text:
I'm wandering the school grounds when I bump
into Biwa Hayahide, who looks quite ill.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha... Not exactly. I have a slight headache.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I checked the weather reports thinking a change
in barometric pressure triggered it, but there
haven't been any major fluctuations recently.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm experiencing fatigue and intermittent pain as
well, so it's likely a migraine, but I can't rule out
other pathologies.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I compared my symptoms against other illnesses
to be cautious, but the more I think about it, the
more my head hurts...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list: You're overthinking again. Take a deep breath.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I recall reading a study that
mentioned the importance of resting your nerves.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Ngh... I just can't seem to settle down.

Biwa Hayahide's seems to really be overthinking
her headache...
